author: Pengfei He, Zhenwei Dai, Bing He, Hui Liu, Xianfeng Tang, Hanqing Lu, Juanhui Li, Jiayuan Ding, Subhabrata Mukherjee, Suhang Wang, Yue Xing, Jiliang Tang, Benoit Dumoulin

readme.entry: - **[TRAJECT-Bench: A trajectory-aware benchmark for evaluating agentic tool use](https://www.amazon.science/publications/traject-bench-a-trajectory-aware-benchmark-for-evaluating-agentic-tool-use)** — Pengfei He, Zhenwei Dai, Bing He, Hui Liu, Xianfeng Tang, Hanqing Lu, Juanhui Li, Jiayuan Ding, Subhabrata Mukherjee, Suhang Wang, Yue Xing, Jiliang Tang, Benoit Dumoulin — <https://www.amazon.science/publications/traject-bench-a-trajectory-aware-benchmark-for-evaluating-agentic-tool-use> · *paper/benchmark* — Amazon Science benchmark for tool-use trajectories, tool selection, argument correctness, and dependency/order satisfaction. 🆕

factuality.reason: structured evidence plus fetched source snapshot

quality.reason: concrete eval artifacts or methodology signals present

recency.reason: evidence indicates 2025-2026 or actively updated source

section: 9 · Agent-specific evaluation (trajectories, tool use, multi-turn, world state, multi-agent, localization)
source_seam: company research pages via Exa + curl primary page
title: TRAJECT-Bench: A trajectory-aware benchmark for evaluating agentic tool use

worker.candidate_reason: Clears the bar because it adds fine-grained trajectory diagnostics to final-answer accuracy, using high-fidelity executable tools and production-style API tasks to expose tool confusion and parameter-blind selection failure modes.
worker.evidence: Amazon Science page fetched in evidence-amazon-traject-bench.html states TRAJECT-Bench evaluates whether tools are selected, parameterized, and ordered correctly; it pairs executable tools with production-style APIs and reports trajectory-level diagnostics including tool selection, argument correctness, and dependency/order satisfaction.
worker.summary: Amazon Science benchmark for tool-use trajectories, tool selection, argument correctness, and dependency/order satisfaction.
